app_release_notes: v0.16.6 - Best Load card tighter and more readable. Pocket Card redesigned: 'Elevation' / 'Wind 10 mph' with 'Hold' and 'Clicks' side-by-side, TOF column now populates on every range, click count auto-computed from your scope click size. Load Library: right-click a saved load to copy, open in Excel, or delete. New Load: warns if your current winner isn't saved to the Library yet. Plus Cmd+1-7 keyboard shortcuts, click-to-browse on the CSV drop zone, and toast notifications on save.
